name: Remote Receiver → On Dish
description: An automation to perform when a dish network remote code has been decoded. A variable `x` of type <APIStruct text="remote_base::DishData" path="remote_base::DishData" /> is passed to the automation for use in lambdas. Beware that Dish remotes use a different carrier frequency (57.6kHz) that many receiver hardware don't decode.
